encriptacion.title: Encryption and Ciphering - TecnoCrypter
encriptacion.description: Complete guides on encryption, data ciphering and information protection.
encriptacion.landingTitle: Encryption: clear guides to protect information
encriptacion.landingDescription: Educational content about encryption, privacy, secure messaging, file protection and practical cryptography habits without unnecessary complexity.
encriptacion.intro1: We translate technical concepts such as AES, ChaCha20, hashing, public keys and end-to-end encryption into practical decisions.
encriptacion.intro2: The guides connect theory with real use: when to encrypt, which tool to choose and which configuration mistakes to avoid.
encriptacion.intro3: The goal is to help you protect personal or professional data while understanding each method's limits.

criptomonedas.title: Cryptocurrencies - TecnoCrypter
criptomonedas.description: Analysis, guides and updated news about Bitcoin, Ethereum and the crypto ecosystem.
criptomonedas.landingTitle: Cryptocurrencies: security, adoption and practical analysis
criptomonedas.landingDescription: Guides and analysis about Bitcoin, Ethereum, wallets, self-custody and real risks in the crypto ecosystem. We prioritize useful context over speculative headlines.
criptomonedas.intro1: We explain crypto concepts with a security focus: key custody, wallets, smart contracts and exposure to common scams.
criptomonedas.intro2: Each article separates relevant trends from market noise, with actionable recommendations for users and technical teams.
criptomonedas.intro3: When we cover news, we add practical implications: what changes, who is affected and which measures are worth reviewing.

noticias.title: Cybersecurity News - TecnoCrypter
noticias.description: Latest news and updates on cybersecurity, digital threats and protection.
noticias.landingTitle: Tech news with digital security context
noticias.landingDescription: Cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, privacy and technology news explained with practical impact for users, creators and businesses.
noticias.intro1: We select news that affects digital security, privacy or the way technology is used in daily work.
noticias.intro2: Each piece prioritizes verifiable context, consequences and reasonable steps over alarmism or repeated press releases.
noticias.intro3: When a story implies risk, we add warning signs to watch for and concrete actions to reduce exposure.
